message:
feat: Use type inference for dict comprehension key type

Move key type determination after loop variable temp vars are set up
so the type inferrer can properly resolve function call return types.

- Use type_traits.isIntegral() to check key type instead of syntactic
  isIntExpr() which only checked AST structure
- This fixes cases like {add_call('key', k): v for k, v in ...} where
  add_call returns int but was treated as string key
